note: Gemini multi-speaker demo playback. Turn gaps are measured from the recorded audio at runtime.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Cedar Dental Studio, this is Alice. How can I help?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I've been having some tooth pain and wanted to see if someone could take a look.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. Would you like to schedule a visit for that?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Have you been seen here before?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No, this would be my first time.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem. Can I get your first and last name?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks, Jordan. And your date of birth?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: March 14th, 1994.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. What's the best phone number for you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Got it, one moment while I check.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I have Tuesday at 10:15 AM or Wednesday at 3:30 PM. Would either of those work?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Do you have anything later? I work until around 4.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check that for you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I do have Thursday at 4:45 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That works.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Will you be using dental insurance?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. You're booked for Thursday at 4:45 PM at Cedar Dental Studio for a tooth pain visit. I also texted you the new-patient intake and insurance forms. Please fill those out before you come in.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, perfect. Thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. We'll see you Thursday.
